response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development, including C++ (used in National Instruments and MGSoftware roles), but his recent focus has been predominantly on web/mobile technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Ember.js, Dlang) rather than industrial automation or C++-heavy systems. His lack of direct experience with cloud platforms (Azure), industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA), IEC 62443, or high-performance C++ systems for automation machinery raises significant concerns about his alignment with this role. Additionally, his security expertise appears focused on testing methodologies rather than secure development lifecycle practices for industrial systems.
strengths: Strong C++ foundation (National Instruments, MGSoftware) with object-oriented and embedded systems experience
Proven track record in scalable, high-performance systems (Dunnhumby, Altom Consulting)
Active open-source contributions and technical leadership (GISCollective, workshops)
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last significant C++ role was 2015) and no evidence of C++11/14/17/20 usage
No demonstrated experience with industrial automation protocols (Modbus, OPC UA) or cloud platforms (Azure)
Lacks documented experience with IEC 62443 or Secure Development Lifecycle in industrial contexts

key_factors.factor: Recent C++ and scalable systems experience
